name: Wide Gathering
description: Multiple figures scattered across a shared space.
hld_patterns: {setting}. Several figures scattered across a shared space.
{setting}. A gathering — figures distributed across the frame, at various distances.
{setting}. A wide shot of a communal space, figures spread throughout.
background_pool: A spacious living room with high ceilings, a stone fireplace on one wall, large windows letting in afternoon light, bookshelves lining the walls, mismatched armchairs and a threadbare rug, plants on the windowsill, the space warm and lived-in

A community courtyard between apartment buildings, string lights crisscrossing overhead, potted plants on balconies, a communal table and benches, children's chalk drawings on the flagstones, laundry hanging from upper windows
A village green under a large oak tree, wooden benches around the perimeter, a stone well at one end, cottages with thatched roofs visible behind low hedges, dappled shade and summer light
A beachside fire pit at dusk, driftwood logs arranged as seating, the sand pale in the fading light, waves visible in the middle distance, the sky turning orange and purple, a chill in the air
action_pool: standing with a drink in hand
sitting cross-legged, plate on their lap
arms crossed, weight on one leg
crouching, hands busy with something small
gesturing broadly while telling a story
turning to face someone who just arrived
